text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇪🇸 Israeli Foreign Minister Saar announced that Israel has barred Spain from participating in the Civil Military Coordination Center in Kiryat Gat. He accused the Sanchez government of acting against Israel in every possible way and leveling blood libel against the IDF. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇪🇸 以色列外交部长萨尔宣布，以色列已禁止西班牙参与位于基里亚特加特（Kiryat Gat）的民事军事协调中心。他指责桑切斯政府在各方面与以色列作对，并对以色列国防军（IDF）进行血腥诽谤。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 A senior source cited by Press TV stated that the continuation of talks remains contingent on the Zionist regime refraining from attacking Beirut and the Dahieh suburb. Should the regime violate this and strike Beirut again, the negotiations will be terminated.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 据Press TV援引的一位高级消息人士称，谈判能否继续取决于犹太复国主义政权是否停止攻击贝鲁特及其达希耶（Dahieh）郊区。如果该政权违反此规定并再次袭击贝鲁特，谈判将终止。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah published a footage showcasing launching rockets allegedly targeting the Stella Maris base belonging to the Israeli military in the city of Haifa @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发布了一段视频，展示了据称针对以色列军方位于海法市的斯特拉马里斯（Stella Maris）基地的火箭弹发射过程。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from ResistanceTrench mirror: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israel strikes Nabatieh in South Lebanon, huge clouds of smoke engulf residential buildings. Several reported killed as IOF intensifies bombing in the south.
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 ResistanceTrench 镜像：🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列袭击黎巴嫩南部纳巴泰（Nabatieh），巨大的烟云吞没了居民楼。据报道，随着以色列国防军（IOF）加强对南部的轰炸，已有数人死亡。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israel strikes Nabatieh in South Lebanon, huge clouds of smoke engulf residential buildings. Several reported killed as IOF intensifies bombing in the south.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列袭击黎巴嫩南部纳巴泰（Nabatieh），巨大的烟云吞没了居民楼。随着以色列国防军（IOF）加强对南部的轰炸，已有数人死亡。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President Vance told the press that he is hopeful that negotiations in Islamabad will be a success, that if Iran is willing to negotiate in good faith the U.S. will extend an open hand. "We're looking forward to the negotiation. I think it's going to be positive. We'll of course see. As the president of the United States said, if the Iranians are willing to negotiate in good faith, we're certainly willing to extend an open hand. If they're going to try to play us, then they're going to find that the negotiating team is not that receptive. So we're trying to have a positive negotiation. The president has given us some pretty clear guidelines, and we're going to see.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国副总统万斯向媒体表示，他希望在伊斯兰堡的谈判能够取得成功，如果伊朗愿意真诚谈判，美国将伸出友谊之手。“我们期待着这次谈判。我认为这将是积极的。当然，我们拭目以待。正如美国总统所说，如果伊朗人愿意真诚谈判，我们当然愿意伸出友谊之手。如果他们试图耍弄我们，那么他们会发现谈判团队并不那么容易接受。所以我们正在努力进行一次积极的谈判。总统已经给了我们一些非常明确的指导方针，我们将拭目以待。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Al-Jadeed correspondent in Washington: A preliminary phone call is taking place today between the Lebanese Ambassador and the Israeli Ambassador as part of a preparatory meeting ahead of Tuesday's session. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Al-Jadeed驻华盛顿记者：黎巴嫩大使和以色列大使今天正在进行初步通话，作为周二会议前的筹备会议的一部分。 @wfwitness

text: 🌟 Hezbollah targets the Stella Maris base belonging to the Israeli enemy army in the occupied city of Haifa.
text_zh: 🌟 真主党瞄准了以色列敌军位于被占领城市海法的斯特拉马里斯（Stella Maris）基地。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部2个地区响起红色警报：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel JD Vance has boarded Air Force Two, heading to Pakistan ahead of high-level Iran talks alongside Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042588454064619628/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：JD·万斯已登上空军二号，在史蒂夫·威特科夫（Steve Witkoff）和贾里德·库什纳（Jared Kushner）的陪同下，前往巴基斯坦进行高级别伊朗问题会谈。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042588454064619628/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Property taxes across the U.S. are rising faster than inflation, with the average homeowner paying $4,427 last year, up 3.7% from 2024. (CBS) tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：美国各地的房产税上涨速度超过了通货膨胀，去年普通房主平均支付了4,427美元，比2024年增长了3.7%。(CBS) 推文

text: Open Source Intel ICYMI President Donald Trump says the ceasefire is only temporary, adding that renewed fighting remains possible if Iran does not agree to a deal. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042587816631152764/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：ICYMI（如果你错过了），唐纳德·特朗普总统表示停火只是暂时的，并补充说如果伊朗不同意达成协议，重新开战仍有可能。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042587816631152764/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated The Kremlin now says it wants "lasting peace," not just a ceasefire. Peskov claims the Easter truce is purely humanitarian and suggests Zelensky could bring full peace today if he just made the "right decisions." Sure thing. Zelensky says Ukraine is ready for a mirrored ceasefire during the Easter holidays to give people safety. Meanwhile, the Kremlin announced an Easter truce from 4:00 PM on April 11 through April 12. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：克里姆林宫现在表示，它想要的是“持久和平”，而不仅仅是停火。佩斯科夫声称复活节休战纯粹是出于人道主义，并暗示泽连斯基如果做出“正确的决定”，今天就能带来全面和平。当然。泽连斯基表示，乌克兰准备在复活节假期期间进行对等停火，以保障人民的安全。与此同时，克里姆林宫宣布从4月11日下午4点至4月12日进行复活节休战。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Vice President JD Vance departs for negotiations with Iran in Pakistan: We’re looking forward to the negotiation. I think it’s going to be positive. If the Iranians are willing to negotiate in good faith, we're certainly willing to extend the open hand. If they’re going to try to play us, they’re going to find that the negotiating team is not that receptive. We're going to try and have a positive negotiation. The President has given us some pretty clear guidelines, and we’ll see how it goes. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 副总统JD·万斯启程前往巴基斯坦与伊朗进行谈判：我们期待着这次谈判。我认为这将是积极的。如果伊朗人愿意真诚谈判，我们当然愿意伸出友谊之手。如果他们试图耍弄我们，他们会发现谈判团队并不那么容易接受。我们正在努力进行一次积极的谈判。总统已经给了我们一些非常明确的指导方针，我们将看看进展如何。 推文

text: Open Source Intel ICYMI Chairman of the US Joint Chiefs of Staff Dan Caine: We attacked more than 13,000 targets in Iran, of which 4,000 were dynamic targets. 80% of the Iranian air defense system was destroyed (1,500 targets). 450 ballistic missile storage facilities and 800 UAV storage facilities were destroyed. More than 2,000 command and control points were destroyed. We sank more than 90% of Iran's naval fleet - 150 ships are at the bottom of the sea, as well as half of the small attack boats of the Iranian Revolutionary Guards. 700 attacks were carried out against naval mines. We estimate that we destroyed more than 95% of their naval mines. We destroyed Iran's defense industry base. Together with our partners, we attacked 90% of their weapons factories. About 80% of Iran's nuclear industry base was damaged. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：美国参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩（Dan Caine）：我们袭击了伊朗境内的13,000多个目标，其中4,000个是动态目标。80%的伊朗防空系统被摧毁（1,500个目标）。450个弹道导弹储存设施和800个无人机储存设施被摧毁。超过2,000个指挥和控制点被摧毁。我们击沉了伊朗海军舰队的90%以上——150艘船只沉入海底，以及伊朗革命卫队一半的小型攻击艇。针对海军水雷进行了700次攻击。我们估计我们摧毁了他们95%以上的水雷。我们摧毁了伊朗的国防工业基地。我们与合作伙伴一起袭击了他们90%的武器工厂。约80%的伊朗核工业基地遭到破坏。 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. Vice President JD Vance has just left Joint Base Andrew’s for Islamabad, Pakistan, for talks with Iran on ending the conflict in the Middle East. Speaking to Fox News on the tarmac, Vice President Vance said that Iran must negotiate in good faith for talks to realize any success. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：美国副总统JD·万斯刚刚离开安德鲁斯联合基地前往巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡，就结束中东冲突与伊朗进行会谈。在停机坪上接受福克斯新闻采访时，万斯副总统表示，伊朗必须真诚谈判，会谈才能取得任何成功。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Sources say key talks between the United States and Iran are expected to begin tomorrow. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：消息人士称，美国和伊朗之间的关键会谈预计将于明天开始。 推文

text: OSINTdefender Ukraine’s top negotiator and head of the presidential office, Kyrylo Budanov, has said that he has seen progress on a potential deal with Russia over the ongoing Russo-Ukrainian War. Budanov also says that he believes Russia also would like to see an end to the conflict. Talks between the two nations have been pushed by U.S. President Donald J. Trump since his election, with past rounds of talks meriting little success. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：乌克兰首席谈判代表兼总统办公室主任基里洛·布达诺夫（Kyrylo Budanov）表示，他看到了在正在进行的俄乌战争中与俄罗斯达成潜在协议的进展。布达诺夫还表示，他相信俄罗斯也希望看到冲突结束。自唐纳德·特朗普总统当选以来，两国之间的会谈一直受到他的推动，但过去的几轮会谈收效甚微。 推文

text: Open Source Intel JD Vance says President Donald Trump has set “very clear guidelines” for ongoing negotiations. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042583602827853844/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：JD·万斯表示，唐纳德·特朗普总统为正在进行的谈判设定了“非常明确的指导方针”。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042583602827853844/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A Financial Times report says the war with Iran has exposed sharp divisions inside NATO, after several European states reportedly resisted US requests to use bases on their territory. Eastern members, including Poland and the Baltic states, are said to have reacted angrily to the stance of France, Spain, Italy, and initially the United Kingdom. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一份《金融时报》的报告称，与伊朗的战争暴露了北约内部的严重分歧，此前据报道，几个欧洲国家抵制了美国要求使用其领土上基地的请求。据称，包括波兰和波罗的海国家在内的东部成员国对法国、西班牙、意大利以及最初是英国的立场反应愤怒。 推文

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 All logistical and security preparations in Islamabad are complete, though the start of negotiations has been officially rescheduled for tomorrow morning . While U.S. advance teams are already on the ground, the Iranian representatives and Vice President J.D. Vance have yet to land , with the American delegation currently en route from Washington. The world’s attention remains fixed on the Pakistani capital as it prepares to host these pivotal talks aimed at redefining regional security .
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊斯兰堡的所有后勤和安全准备工作已经完成，尽管谈判的开始时间已正式重新安排到明天上午。虽然美国的先遣队已经在现场，但伊朗代表和JD·万斯副总统尚未降落，美国代表团目前正在从华盛顿赶来的途中。全世界的目光仍然聚焦在巴基斯坦首都，因为它正准备主办这些旨在重新定义地区安全的关键会谈。

text: 🌟 Hezbollah chief praises bravery, steadfastness of resistance fighters in letter to nation — Naim Qassem: Blood of our martyrs contributed to victory against brutal, tyrannical US-Israeli enemy — Naim Qassem: Enemy surprised by resistance tactics, defensive capabilities, legendary courage — Hezbollah chief Sheikh Qassem lauds resilience, high morale of Lebanese nation in confronting enemies — Naim Qassem: Resistance will continue till last breath, it won't accept return to previous situation — Naim Qassem: Resistance will continue to protect nation, restore its sovereignty, expel occupiers — Naim Qassem: Israeli enemy failed on battlefield in confronting brave resistance fighters
text_zh: 🌟 真主党领导人在致全国的信中赞扬了抵抗战士的勇敢和坚定——纳伊姆·卡西姆（Naim Qassem）：我们烈士的鲜血为战胜残酷、暴虐的美国-以色列敌人做出了贡献——纳伊姆·卡西姆：敌人对抵抗战术、防御能力和传奇般的勇气感到惊讶——真主党领导人谢赫·卡西姆赞扬黎巴嫩人民在对抗敌人时的韧性和高昂士气——纳伊姆·卡西姆：抵抗将持续到最后一口气，它不会接受回到以前的情况——纳伊姆·卡西姆：抵抗将继续保护国家，恢复其主权，驱逐占领者——纳伊姆·卡西姆：以色列敌人在战场上对抗勇敢的抵抗战士时失败了

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The U.S. Department of War has released a new infographic listing the achievements of Operation Epic Fury by the numbers. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国战争部发布了一份新的信息图，列出了“史诗愤怒行动”（Operation Epic Fury）的各项成就数据。 @wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israel bombs ambulance in South Lebanon, all medics killed.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列轰炸了黎巴嫩南部的一辆救护车，所有医务人员丧生。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike has targeted the southern Lebanese town of Kfar Rumman. Footage: PressTV
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列空袭了黎巴嫩南部城镇卡法鲁曼（Kfar Rumman）。视频来源：PressTV

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 JD Vance takes off for Iran peace talks in Pakistan: “If the Iranians are willing to negotiate in good faith, we're wiling to extend an open hand If they’re going to try to play us, they’re going to find the negotiating team is not receptive”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 JD·万斯启程前往巴基斯坦进行伊朗和平谈判：“如果伊朗人愿意真诚谈判，我们愿意伸出友谊之手。如果他们试图耍弄我们，他们会发现谈判团队并不容易接受”

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Two commentators on Israeli Channel 13, Raviv Drucker and Alon Ben David, suggested that Israel may be pushing Lebanon toward internal conflict in an effort to pressure the Lebanese state into confronting Hezbollah, arguing such a scenario could align with Israeli strategic interests. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列第13频道（Israeli Channel 13）的两名评论员拉维夫·德鲁克（Raviv Drucker）和阿隆·本·大卫（Alon Ben David）建议，以色列可能正在推动黎巴嫩走向内部冲突，以向黎巴嫩国家施压，迫使其对抗真主党，并认为这种情况可能符合以色列的战略利益。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF announced that troops of the 401st Brigade destroyed a loaded launcher aimed at Israel and uncovered an underground shaft in southern Lebanon. Additional weapons were located and destroyed, including anti-tank missiles, firearms, and magazines. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，第401旅的部队摧毁了一个瞄准以色列的装载发射器，并在黎巴嫩南部发现了一个地下竖井。此外还发现并摧毁了其他武器，包括反坦克导弹、枪支和弹匣。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 Reuters: Chinese independent refiners have bought Iranian oil at premiums to Brent for the first time in years, at $1.50 to $2 a barrel to ICE Brent, compared to a $10 per barrel discount before the conflict. The cargoes are set to be delivered this month, with at least two refiners in Dongying, a major hub for independents in the eastern Shandong province, making the purchases. This development comes as China has raised ceiling prices for retail gasoline and diesel, and refining margins at teapots have improved with lower crude costs and higher domestic fuel prices. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 路透社：中国独立炼油厂多年来首次以高于布伦特原油的价格购买伊朗石油，每桶价格比ICE布伦特原油高出1.50至2美元，而冲突前每桶有10美元的折扣。这些货物定于本月交付，东营（山东省东部独立炼油厂的主要中心）的至少两家炼油厂进行了采购。这一发展正值中国提高了汽油和柴油的零售价格上限，且由于原油成本降低和国内燃料价格上涨，茶壶炼油厂的炼油利润率有所改善。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇶🇦 Al-Jadeed: A Qatari aid plane has arrived at Beirut international airport. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇶🇦 Al-Jadeed：一架卡塔尔援助飞机已抵达贝鲁特国际机场。

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The IDF has bombed the vicinity of the saray in Nabatieh (a state institution) Reports of a massacre amount state security. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列国防军轰炸了纳巴泰（Nabatieh）政府大楼（国家机构）附近。有关于国家安全部门发生大屠杀的报道。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF published a footage shows troops from the 91st Division eliminating a "terrorist" cell in southern Lebanon. According to the announcement, earlier this week, troops identified a "terrorist" cell operating near their position. One of the operatives was seen taking cover in vegetation and was later eliminated in an Israeli Air Force strike directed by ground forces. During the strike, a vehicle carrying additional members of the cell attempting to flee was identified and struck. IDF also announced that since the start of the targeted operation in Lebanon, 91st Division troops have eliminated hundreds of Hezbollah operatives. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发布了一段视频，显示第91师的部队在黎巴嫩南部消灭了一个“恐怖分子”小组。根据公告，本周早些时候，部队发现了一个在他们阵地附近活动的“恐怖分子”小组。其中一名武装人员被发现躲在植被中，随后在地面部队指挥的以色列空军空袭中被消灭。在空袭期间，一辆载有试图逃跑的小组其他成员的车辆被发现并遭到打击。以色列国防军还宣布，自黎巴嫩定点行动开始以来，第91师部队已消灭了数百名真主党武装人员。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel A French “Freedom Flotilla” is sailing across the Mediterranean toward the Gaza Strip, aiming to link up with other European vessels in a coordinated show of solidarity. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042581707988099133/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：一支法国“自由船队”正在穿越地中海前往加沙地带，旨在与其他欧洲船只汇合，进行协调一致的声援展示。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042581707988099133/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Will be closely watching the nuclear issue, this was President Trumps red line he gave on April 8th https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042581298565296612/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：将密切关注核问题，这是特朗普总统在4月8日设定的红线。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042581298565296612/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor China’s growing confidence isn’t just about America being tied down at home, it’s also watching the Iran war expose the White House’s weaknesses and ongoing mistakes. They see their window, and it’s opening. BREAKING Chinese President Xi Jinping tells Taiwan opposition leader 'full of confidence' Chinese and Taiwanese people will be united https://twitter.com/AFP/status/2042452711698751817/photo/1 - AFP News Agency tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：中国日益增长的自信不仅是因为美国被国内事务缠身，还在于它看着伊朗战争暴露了白宫的弱点和持续的错误。他们看到了自己的机会之窗，而且正在打开。突发：中国国家主席习近平告诉台湾反对派领导人，对中国和台湾人民将实现统一“充满信心”。 https://twitter.com/AFP/status/2042452711698751817/photo/1 - 法新社 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hunter Biden has challenged Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. to a cage fight, escalating tensions with President Donald Trump’s family. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042579597024264383/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：亨特·拜登（Hunter Biden）向埃里克·特朗普（Eric Trump）和小唐纳德·特朗普（Donald Trump Jr.）发起笼斗挑战，加剧了与唐纳德·特朗普总统家族的紧张关系。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042579597024264383/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: “The Israeli enemy has failed on the battlefield against the resistance and did not succeed in carrying out a ground invasion as it repeatedly claimed. The fighters on the front lines are a solid wall that has shattered Zionist ambitions. The resistance will continue until the last breath. We will not accept a return to the previous situation, and we call to stop making free concessions. Together, as a state, army, people, and resistance, we will defend our land, restore its sovereignty, and expel the occupier. The enemy’s threats and weapons will not frighten us.” Hezbollah: Resistance will continue until its last breath. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042577655665422757/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆（Naim Qassem）：“以色列敌人在战场上对抗抵抗力量时失败了，并没有像它反复声称的那样成功进行地面入侵。前线的战士是一堵坚实的墙，粉碎了犹太复国主义的野心。抵抗将持续到最后一口气。我们不会接受回到以前的情况，我们呼吁停止做出无谓的让步。作为一个国家、军队、人民和抵抗力量，我们将共同保卫我们的土地，恢复其主权，驱逐占领者。敌人的威胁和武器不会吓倒我们。” 真主党：抵抗将持续到最后一口气。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042577655665422757/photo/1 - 开源情报 推文

A video shows the moment of impacts in the town of Nabatieh located in southern Lebanon, with clouds of smoke rising over the targeted area. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2042577557279695321/video/1 tweet

text: JD Vance departs for peace talks with Iran in Pakistan: We’re looking forward to the negotiation. I think it’s going to be positive. If the Iranians are willing to negotiate in good faith and extend an open hand, that’s one thing. If they’re going to try to play us, they’re going to find that the negotiating team is not that receptive. The President has given us some pretty clear guidelines, and we’ll see how it goes.
text_zh: JD·万斯启程前往巴基斯坦进行伊朗和平谈判：我们期待着这次谈判。我认为这将是积极的。如果伊朗人愿意真诚谈判并伸出友谊之手，那是一回事。如果他们试图耍弄我们，他们会发现谈判团队并不那么容易接受。总统已经给了我们一些非常明确的指导方针，我们将看看进展如何。

text: Clash Point host Isaac Eshetu sits with Middle East Expert Adam Weinstein, deputy director of the Middle East program at the Quincy Institute for Responsible Statecraft, to examine the recent ceasefire between Iran & the United States. • Is it a real path to de-escalation? • Is it simply a pause in the conflict? • Is it being deliberately sabotaged? • Who benefits & who doesn't? WATCH
text_zh: Clash Point主持人艾萨克·埃舍图（Isaac Eshetu）与中东专家、昆西负责任治国研究所（Quincy Institute for Responsible Statecraft）中东项目副主任亚当·温斯坦（Adam Weinstein）坐下来，审视伊朗与美国之间最近的停火协议。 • 这是一条真正的缓和之路吗？ • 这仅仅是冲突的暂停吗？ • 它是否被蓄意破坏？ • 谁受益，谁受损？ 观看

text: Cheng Li-wun, Leader of Taiwan’s opposition Kuomintang, after meeting Chinese President Xi Jinping today: No one wants to see Taiwan’s next generation go to the battlefield.
text_zh: 台湾反对派国民党领导人程丽文（Cheng Li-wun）在今天会见中国国家主席习近平后表示：没有人希望看到台湾的下一代走上战场。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF published a footage showing alleged Hezbollah operatives launching rockets toward northern Israel from a school while concealing a launcher inside the compound. A short while ago, the IDF identified that Hezbollah launched rockets from a school compound in the Tir Zibneh area in southern Lebanon. Newly released footage shows the launcher’s heat signature clearly, as it is moved in real time within the school grounds, highlighting the use of civilian infrastructure for military purposes in violation of international law. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军发布了一段视频，显示据称是真主党武装人员从一所学校向以色列北部发射火箭弹，同时将发射器隐藏在院内。不久前，以色列国防军发现真主党从黎巴嫩南部提尔齐布内（Tir Zibneh）地区的一所学校院内发射了火箭弹。新发布的视频清晰地显示了发射器的热信号，因为它在学校场地内实时移动，突显了违反国际法将民用基础设施用于军事目的的行为。 @wfwitness

text: 🇦🇪 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Treacherous? Look in the Mirror: UAE Advisor Gargash whines about Iran while selling out Persian Gulf neighbors for favors from War Criminal U.S.-Israel Axis

text: 🇸🇮 ❌ 🇮🇱 Slovenia joins Spain’s effort to suspend the EU–Israel Association Agreement. ℹ️ The EU–Israel Association Agreement is a treaty between the European Union and Israel that sets the terms for their trade, political cooperation, and broader relations. It also includes a human rights clause, which can be used as a basis to review or suspend the agreement. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇸🇮 ❌ 🇮🇱 斯洛文尼亚加入西班牙的行列，努力暂停《欧盟-以色列联系国协定》。ℹ️ 《欧盟-以色列联系国协定》是欧盟与以色列之间的一项条约，规定了双方贸易、政治合作和更广泛关系的条款。它还包括一项人权条款，可作为审查或暂停该协定的基础。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
